intro_sentences.en: Let's study the simple future of to do.
intro_sentences.pt-BR: Vamos estudar o futuro simples de fazer.
intro_sentences.es-ES: Vamos a estudiar el futuro simple de hacer.
intro_sentences.fr-FR: Étudions le futur simple de faire.

sample_sentences.en: The verb to do appears in many daily actions.
sample_sentences.pt-BR: O verbo fazer aparece em muitas ações do dia a dia.
sample_sentences.es-ES: El verbo hacer aparece en muchas acciones cotidianas.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: Le verbe faire apparaît dans beaucoup d’actions quotidiennes.

sample_sentences.en: I will do the homework tonight.
sample_sentences.pt-BR: Eu farei a lição esta noite.
sample_sentences.es-ES: Yo haré la tarea esta noche.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: Je ferai les devoirs ce soir.

sample_sentences.en: You will do a great job.
He will do the dishes later.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: Il fera la vaisselle plus tard.

sample_sentences.en: She will do the shopping tomorrow.
It will do the job well.
You all will do the project next week.
sample_sentences.pt-BR: Vocês farão o projeto na próxima semana.
sample_sentences.es-ES: Ustedes harán el proyecto la próxima semana.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: Vous ferez le projet la semaine prochaine.

sample_sentences.en: They will do more practice tomorrow.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: Ils feront plus de pratique demain.
